title: Delicate Dry Portuguese Shrimp Skewers
description: A fresh and light Portuguese dish featuring sherry and dry shrimp, perfect for a hangover cure, this shojin-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat. It is a great option for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together sherry, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the shrimp onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and paprika.
